mapper.select: SELECT ID, MAINT_INFO_ID, EQUIP_ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, USED_QUANTITY, APPLICATION_QUANTITY - NVL(USED_QUANTITY, 0) AS UNUSED_QUANTITY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAINT_PART_REPLACE WHERE MAINT_INFO_ID = #{maintInfoId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT WO.WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO AS warehouseOutNo, OD.ID AS warehouseOutDetailId, OD.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, OD.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, OD.SPECIFICATION_MODEL AS specificationModel, OD.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, OD.UNIT_NAME AS unitName, NVL(OD.OUT_QUANTITY, 0) AS applicationQuantity, NVL(PR.USED_QUANTITY, 0) AS usedQuantity, (NVL(OD.OUT_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(PR.USED_QUANTITY, 0)) AS unusedQuantity FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL OD INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT WO ON OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID = WO.ID INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL AD ON OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID = AD.ID INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP OA ON AD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID = OA.ID AND OA.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, SUM(USED_QUANTITY) AS USED_QUANTITY FROM E_MAINT_PART_REPLACE GROUP BY WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID ) PR ON OD.ID = PR.WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID WHERE WO.STATUS = 1 AND OD.OUT_QUANTITY > 0 AND (AD.EQUIP_IDS = #{equipId}) AND (NVL(AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(PR.USED_QUANTITY, 0)) > 0 ORDER BY WO.WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, OD.ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAINT_PART_REPLACE ( ID, MAINT_INFO_ID, EQUIP_ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, USED_QUANTITY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maintInfoId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{usedQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAINT_PART_REPLACE
MAINT_INFO_ID = #{maintInfoId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
EQUIP_ID = #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO = #{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID = #{warehouseOutDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_MODEL = #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_QUANTITY = #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
USED_QUANTITY = #{usedQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(USED_QUANTITY), 0) FROM E_MAINT_PART_REPLACE WHERE WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID = #{warehouseOutDetailId}
